english.commentary_text: The referees lead the way onto the pitch, followed by the teams in their pre-match warm-up gear. The crowd is electric, cheering as the teams make their entrance. The atmosphere is charged with anticipation as both teams line up for the kickoff, ready to kick off this World Cup 2026 match.

english.commentary_text: The stage is set for the 2026 World Cup as Germany and Curacao line up for the pre-match ceremony. A close-up captures a German player in a white jacket, standing solemnly beside an FIFA flag, while Curacao’s athletes in blue and yellow kits march into position. The crowd roars as the teams settle into place, ready for the anthem and the kickoff that will begin this historic tournament.

subtitle_lines.text: Germany and Curacao line up for the 2026 World Cup pre-match ceremony.

chinese.commentary_text: 2026年世界杯的序幕即将拉开，德国队与库拉索队正在进行赛前仪式。双方球员在中圈列队，旗帜在灯光下飘扬。镜头特写捕捉到一名身穿白色夹克的德国球员，肃穆地站在国际足联旗帜旁；而身着蓝黄球衣的库拉索队员也已就位。随着两队站定，现场观众欢呼沸腾，奏响国歌的时刻即将到来，这也将开启这一历史性的赛事。

subtitle_lines.text: 德国队与库拉索队为2026年世界杯赛前仪式列队。

english.commentary_text: The stage is set for the 2026 World Cup in Houston. Germany and Curacao line up on the pitch, with both teams standing solemnly as the national flags unfurl beneath them. The German players, arms linked, stand united in white jackets and black shorts, while Curacao’s squad stands opposite in blue and yellow. The crowd roars in anticipation as the pre-match ceremony reaches its peak—heads bowed, then raised, ready for the anthem. A moment of unity before the whistle.

subtitle_lines.text: Germany and Curacao line up for the pre-match ceremony in Houston. Teams stand solemnly on giant national flags. Players link arms, heads bowed—then raised—before the anthem. The stadium pulses with anticipation.

chinese.commentary_text: 2026年世界杯的赛场在休斯顿已经就绪。德国队与库拉索队列队登场，双方球员肃立，国旗在他们身后徐徐展开。德国队球员身着白色上衣、黑色短裤，臂挽臂并肩而立；库拉索队则身着蓝黄相间的球衣，与之相对。赛前仪式进入高潮，人群沸腾，期待感达到顶点——球员们低头肃立，随后昂首挺立，静待国歌奏响。哨响之前，这一刻凝聚着团结与敬意。

subtitle_lines.text: 德国队与库拉索队在休斯顿列队参加赛前仪式。双方肃立于巨大国旗之下，球员臂挽臂，低头—抬头—静候国歌。全场蓄势待发，气氛凝重而热烈。

english.commentary_text: The stage is set for the 2026 World Cup in Houston. Both teams, Germany and Curacao, line up solemnly on the pitch as the pre-match ceremony unfolds. The atmosphere is electric with anticipation.

chinese.commentary_text: 休斯顿，2026年世界杯的赛场已经就绪。德国队与库拉索队庄严列队于球场中央，赛前仪式正在进行中。现场气氛热烈，充满期待。

english.commentary_text: The atmosphere in Houston is electric as both teams line up for the pre-match ceremony. Germany's players, including their goalkeeper Manuel Neuer, stand tall with mascots, clapping in anticipation. Meanwhile, Curacao's players, dressed in white jackets and yellow shorts, stand solemnly with arms around each other's shoulders, singing along with their passionate fans in the stands. The large Curacao flag displayed on the pitch adds to the ceremonial ambiance. As the national anthem plays, the entire stadium joins in, creating a powerful moment of unity before the match begins.

chinese.commentary_text: 休斯顿的赛场气氛热烈，双方球队正在列队进行赛前仪式。德国队的球员，包括他们的门将诺伊尔，与吉祥物并肩站立，满怀期待地鼓掌致意。与此同时，库拉索队的球员们身着白色夹克和黄色短裤，神情肃穆地互相搭着肩膀，看台上的球迷热情高涨，球员们也一同合唱。球场中央悬挂的巨型库拉索国旗，更增添了仪式的庄重氛围。随着国歌奏响，全场观众齐声应和，在比赛开始前营造出这一团结而震撼的瞬间。

subtitle_lines.text: 赛前仪式：球队列队，球员与球迷共唱国歌。

english.commentary_text: A spectacular pre-match ceremony unfolds in the stadium as Germany and Curacao line up on the pitch. The field is adorned with massive flags of both nations, creating a vibrant and patriotic atmosphere before the World Cup 2026 match begins.

chinese.commentary_text: 赛前仪式在球场内盛大展开，德国队与库拉索队列队登场。球场两侧悬挂着两国巨大的旗帜，营造出热烈而庄重的氛围，2026年世界杯比赛即将开始。

english.commentary_text: The players line up for the pre-match anthem, hands over hearts as the stadium falls quiet. A moment of respect before the whistle blows.

english.commentary_text: The pre-match ceremony is underway at the World Cup in Houston. Players from both Germany and Curacao are lined up on the pitch, shaking hands with the match officials and each other. The atmosphere is electric as the teams prepare for what promises to be an intense encounter. The referees, dressed in bright yellow kits, are seen engaging with the players, ensuring everything is in order before the big kick-off. The players, clad in their respective warm-up gear, are seen interacting with the young mascots, adding a touch of warmth and tradition to the occasion. As the handshake line concludes, the teams begin to disperse, signaling the imminent start of the match. The crowd's anticipation is palpable, setting the stage for a thrilling contest between Germany and Curacao.

subtitle_lines.text: Pre-match ceremony underway. Players shaking hands with officials and each other.

chinese.commentary_text: 休斯顿世界杯的赛前仪式正在进行中。德国队和库拉索队的球员们在场上列队，与裁判以及彼此握手致意。现场气氛热烈，双方球队即将展开一场势均力敌的较量。身着亮黄色裁判服的裁判们正在与球员交流，确保一切就绪，比赛即将开球。球员们身穿各自的训练服，与可爱的吉祥物互动，为这一时刻增添了一份温情与传统。随着握手环节结束，两队开始散开，比赛即将打响。观众们的期待之情溢于言表，一场精彩的对决即将在德国队和库拉索队之间展开。

subtitle_lines.text: 赛前仪式进行中，球员与裁判及彼此握手。

english.commentary_text: The atmosphere in the stadium is electric as we see passionate fans from both teams. Curacao supporters, donned in their vibrant blue and yellow jerseys with distinctive cowboy hats, are intently watching the match. Meanwhile, German fans, sporting colorful red and yellow wigs, are cheering enthusiastically. The energy between the two sets of fans is palpable, adding to the excitement of this World Cup encounter.

chinese.commentary_text: 现场气氛热烈，双方球迷都激情高涨。库拉索队球迷身着鲜艳的蓝黄球衣，头戴特色牛仔帽，全神贯注地注视着比赛；德国队球迷则戴着色彩缤纷的红黄假发，热情欢呼。两组球迷之间的能量交织在一起，为这场世界杯对决增添了更多兴奋感。

subtitle_lines.text: 库拉索和德国的热情球迷为世界杯赛场营造了热烈氛围。

english.commentary_text: The match officials walk onto the pitch in Houston for the Germany vs Curacao World Cup 2026 fixture. chinese.commentary_text: 比赛官员们步入休斯敦的球场，准备开始2026年世界杯德国对阵库拉索的比赛。摩洛哥裁判贾拉勒·贾韦德带领他的团队，助理裁判扎卡里亚·布林西和穆斯塔法·阿卡卡德同样来自摩洛哥，此外还有南非官员阿博尼莱·汤姆和扎赫莱·西韦拉。他们在开赛前聚集进行赛前简报，这是一个标准但至关重要的仪式。

english.commentary_text: Germany takes control in the final third as No. 7, Havertz, drives forward with the ball. He cuts inside past a sliding Curacao defender and unleashes a low shot from just outside the box. The Curacao goalkeeper dives but can't reach it — the ball nestles into the bottom corner. Net ripples, scoreboard updates to 7-1, and the German fans erupt. Havertz is mobbed by teammates — Wirtz, Goretzka, Schlotterbeck — all sharing in the moment. Replays show the precision of the strike and the defender’s last-ditch effort that fell short. A clinical finish to seal a commanding lead.

subtitle_lines.text: Havertz dribbles into the box, evades defender, shoots — goal!
Ball crosses line, net ripples, 7-1 Germany confirmed.
Havertz celebrates with teammates; fans wave flags, roar in approval.
Replay: Havertz takes shot, goalkeeper dives, ball rolls past into net.
Celebration continues — Goretzka embraces Havertz; Curacao player dejected.

chinese.commentary_text: 德国队在对方半场掌控局面，7号哈弗茨带球向前推进。他内切晃过一名滑铲的库拉索后卫，在禁区外低射破门。库拉索门将奋力扑救却未能触及皮球——球稳稳滚入球门死角。网窝颤动，比分牌更新为7-1，德国球迷瞬间沸腾。哈弗茨被队友维尔茨、格雷茨卡和施洛特贝克团团围住，共同分享这一时刻。回放镜头展现了这记进球的精准度，以及防守球员最后时刻徒劳的尝试。这是一记冷静的终结，彻底锁定胜势。

subtitle_lines.text: 哈弗茨带球突入禁区，晃过防守球员，射门——进球！
球越过球门线，网窝颤动，德国队7-1领先确认。
哈弗茨与队友庆祝；球迷挥舞旗帜，欢呼喝彩。
回放：哈弗茨射门，门将扑救，皮球滚入网窝。
庆祝继续——格雷茨卡拥抱哈弗茨；库拉索球员神情沮丧。

english.commentary_text: The German fans are absolutely electric, waving flags and cheering as the team celebrates their decisive victory. Coach Julian Nagelsmann walks along the sideline, acknowledging the crowd with a serious but satisfied expression before sharing a warm high-five with a young fan wearing a FIFA World Cup 2026 jersey. He then greets players exiting the pitch, including Florian Wirtz, exchanging handshakes and fist bumps as teammates and staff join in the post-match camaraderie.

subtitle_lines.text: 德国球迷赛后狂喜庆祝。纳格尔斯曼教练与小球迷击掌，随后在场边迎接球员。
